scenes.narration: There are moments when life feels too hard. Too heavy. Too much.
scenes.image_prompt: A child sitting under a stormy sky looking overwhelmed, heavy dark clouds above, but a small ray of golden light breaking through, colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: Maybe you're facing something right now that you don't think you can handle.
scenes.image_prompt: A child standing at the foot of an enormous mountain, looking up at it, small and unsure, colorful bible storybook illustration, soft warm light

scenes.narration: Paul wrote these words from a prison cell. He wasn't free. But he was at peace.
scenes.image_prompt: Paul sitting calmly in a stone prison cell, writing by candlelight, peaceful expression, warm golden glow around him, colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: He had learned something most people never discover. That strength doesn't come from yourself.
scenes.image_prompt: Paul looking upward with a serene and knowing smile, soft golden light shining down on him in the cell, colorful peaceful bible illustration

scenes.narration: I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me.
scenes.image_prompt: A child climbing a mountain confidently, golden light surrounding them, a gentle glowing hand guiding them upward from above, colorful hopeful bible storybook art

scenes.narration: Not some things. All things. With the right source of strength behind you.
scenes.image_prompt: Child at the top of a mountain, arms raised in victory, golden sunrise behind them, the long path visible below, joyful and triumphant colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: The test you're nervous about. The hard conversation. The thing you've been putting off.
scenes.image_prompt: A child taking a deep breath before walking through a big door, golden light coming from the other side, encouraging hand on their shoulder, colorful bible illustration

scenes.narration: The grief that feels too heavy. The fear that keeps you up at night. He is bigger than all of it.
scenes.image_prompt: Child wrapped in a warm golden light that shields them from dark shadows all around, peaceful and protected expression, beautiful colorful storybook art

scenes.narration: You were not meant to carry it alone. Ask Him for strength. Then take the next step.
scenes.image_prompt: Child kneeling in prayer, a gentle glowing figure beside them with a hand on their shoulder, peaceful warm scene, bright colorful bible storybook illustration

scenes.narration: I can do all things through Christ who strengthens me. And so... can you.
scenes.image_prompt: Happy confident child running forward on a bright sunny path, arms wide, golden light ahead, family cheering in the background, joyful colorful bible storybook art
